title: 16 Personalities in a Romantic Movie
text: wait wait if you get on that plane now you'll regret it for the rest of your life and why is that is it because i'll be leaving behind the man of my dreams actually no it's because you forgot your phone charger when it comes to battery life no one wants to be caught unawares here you go i cannot stand you in fact whenever i see you i have to come over just to tell you all the reasons why i hate you and you know what i hate the most that you're so good good-looking ah if you were ugly i would not be feeling all these weird feelings [Music]

relationships with guys like you don't work out well that about does it over this last year since your fiance unexpectedly died i've managed to fix your fridge your washer your dryer your ceiling fan your microwave your oven and your cat's self-scooping litter box i guess the only thing left to fix is my heart i was going to say your garbage disposal i'm a handyman not a doctor i can't believe how lucky i am to be with you the fact that someone like you would want to be with someone like me i mean i'm just a responsible attractive girl with a heart of gold running my father's bed and breakfast all by myself ever since he died suddenly a year ago truly i do not deserve this love congrats i'm so happy for you is what i would say if i were a liar the truth is that this warm and fuzzy ceremony is just an act of mutual self-deception a sharad to ignore the fact that we're all lonely weak-minded hold up who is that girl right there of course a stable relationship could be more financially advantageous than my current situation in the long term somehow i've gotten myself tangled up in a love triangle paolo is a mysterious introspective passionate rock star and then you have timmy my co-worker uh on paper timmy is the perfect guy for me i mean he has an average number of personality traits he contributes to a 401k he drives a honda civic oh heck who am i kidding this is an obvious choice paper beats rock every time i need to know if you love me for me or if you just love me for my billions of dollars because if it's the money i totally understand that but if it's for me you title: 16 Personalities in a Romantic Movie
text: ry i'm not gonna be able to make it to your bachelor party the the snow is just so bad here they're closing down all the roads i'm gonna get snowed in at the office here i don't know could be could be days could be a week but at least i can get some work done you know what i mean unfortunately karen from accounting also had the same idea oh crap uh karen i regret to inform you that over the next few days we will have nothing to do except talk to each other drink hot cocoa in the break room together and possibly huddle together for warmth i understand that falling in love with me has shattered your reality and given you a taste for the infinite but i can't be your manic pixie dream girl i'm so much bigger than some stereotype i contain multitudes and those multitudes much to the beat of their own drum gosh darn it hey if you're not doing anything this weekend would you like to come with me to a dinner party i need a fake boyfriend so my family doesn't think i'm still single sure i could pose as your fake boyfriend with no intention of ever becoming your real boyfriend but why does it matter so much because if i don't have a date they'll try to set me up with my mom's wealthy lawyer neighbor i don't like him at all but i'm too agreeable to start a conflict this summer one ugly duckling defies all the odds going from grotesque to drop dead gorgeous but can she catch the eye of her quarterback crush in time for the sadie hawkins dance hold up grotesque i i barely changed anything i look basically the same all i did was put in some contact lenses and stop wearing that stupid hat that's it you know maybe i don't want to go to the dance with someone who was so easily deceived i don't need you chadwick chattington on the one hand i'd be a fool to turn down a marriage proposal from the king but on the other can i really leave behind my self-indulgent lifestyle in the big city and settle down in the quaint rural country of omnivia i suppose it all boils down to this would it be unqueenly if i still want to hit up mardi gras i understand you don't think this could work out between us and i know you don't think there's anyone out there who could love a beautiful girl like you who has been broken by tragedy but what if i told you that's exactly my type i know that things haven't worked out between us and that life is taking us in separate directions right now but what do you say if in 10 years we're both still single we meet on christmas morning at the top of the empire state building let's do it [Music] you ever get the feeling you're forgetting
